Class ResultSetSpliterator.InternalResultSet

java.lang.Object
org.tquadrat.foundation.sql.internal.ResultSetWrapper
org.tquadrat.foundation.sql.internal.ResultSetSpliterator.InternalResultSet
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, ResultSet, Wrapper
Enclosing class:
ResultSetSpliterator
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: ResultSetSpliterator.java 1030 2022-04-06 13:42:02Z tquadrat $") @API(status=INTERNAL, since="0.0.1") private class ResultSetSpliterator.InternalResultSet extends ResultSetWrapper
The wrapper for the result set that disallows several methods to be called.
Author:
Thomas Thrien (thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org)
Version:
$Id: ResultSetSpliterator.java 1030 2022-04-06 13:42:02Z tquadrat $
Since:
0.0.1
